synopsis: A slow pan through a misty, ancient petrified forest reveals towering, moss-covered trees and a tiny glowing lantern marking a hidden path.

shots.prompt: A slow, gentle pan through an ancient, petrified forest, revealing colossal, gnarled trees, their bark entirely covered in vibrant, glowing green moss. The scene is bathed in a deep, cool blue-hour light, with heavy volumetric mist drifting between the towering trunks. A single warm, amber light source is faintly visible deep within the forest, hinting at a hidden path.

Continuing the slow pan, the camera glides deeper into the heart of the petrified forest. The warm amber light now reveals a tiny, glowing lantern marking a narrow, winding pathway through the base of the moss-covered, colossal trees. The intricate details of the ancient bark and glowing moss are visible, while the mist continues to drift, creating a serene, almost magical atmosphere, dwarfing the tiny human artifact.

music: A contemplative and atmospheric piece with a slow, drifting tempo, blending neo-classical and ambient textures. Opens with a single, sustained, deep cello note, slowly joined by a gentle, resonant piano melody, establishing a profound, quiet mood. Subtle, airy woodwind pads (flute, clarinet) weave in, creating a sense of ancient mystery. It builds to a soft, reflective peak with layered strings and piano, then gradually dissipates into a lingering, misty resonance.
